steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice specifies Bellini's role in neutrino research. The key note: Bellini is known for research on solar and geoneutrinos. A good answer must name Bellini and connect him to that specific research.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "Particle physicist Gianpaolo Bellini has worked to advance the scientific understanding of neutrinos through his research on solar and geoneutrinos.": Names Bellini and specifies solar and geoneutrinos — exactly what the question requires. ✓
  • Choice B — "Neutrinos are a type of subatomic particle that particle physicists are still trying to understand.": Does not mention Bellini at all. ✗
  • Choice C — "First discovered in the mid-twentieth century, neutrinos are a type of subatomic particle.": Does not mention Bellini at all. ✗
  • Choice D — "Gianpaolo Bellini is recognized for his particle physics research.": Names Bellini but uses the vague phrase "particle physics research" instead of specifying solar and geoneutrinos. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
